responses: Hello! Welcome to Pallavi Engineering College Helpdesk. How can I assist you today?
Hi there! I'm the PEC virtual assistant. Feel free to ask me anything about admissions, courses, placements, or campus life!
Good day! I'm here to help you with all queries about Pallavi Engineering College. What would you like to know?
Greetings! I'm the PEC Helpdesk Bot. Ask me about B.Tech courses, MBA, fees, placements, hostels, and more!

responses: For B.Tech admission to Pallavi Engineering College, you must qualify TS EAMCET with 10+2 (MPC) and at least 45% marks. Admissions are through TS EAMCET counseling conducted by TSCHE.
MBA admissions at PEC require TS ICET qualification and a graduation degree with minimum 50% marks. Management quota seats are also available for both B.Tech and MBA.

Required documents for admission include: Hall ticket, 10th & 12th mark sheets, Transfer Certificate, Income Certificate, Caste Certificate (if applicable), and ID proof. Visit the admission office at campus for guidance.
For admission queries, you can call us at 6301148377 or 8688652343. Our admission office is open Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 5 PM.

responses: Pallavi Engineering College offers the following B.Tech programs: CSE (120 seats), ECE (60 seats), CS Cyber Security (60 seats), EEE (60 seats), Civil Engineering (60 seats), CS Data Science, and CS AI & ML. MBA with 60 seats is also offered.
The B.Tech program at PEC is a 4-year course. MBA is a 2-year program with specializations in Marketing, Finance, HR, and Entrepreneurship.
Our CSE department offers specializations including Cyber Security, Data Science, and Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning — making it future-ready for the tech industry.
We offer B.Tech in 7 branches: CSE, ECE, EEE, Civil, CS (Cyber Security), CS (Data Science), and CS (AI & ML), along with a 2-year MBA program affiliated to JNTUH.

responses: The exam timetable is released by JNTUH and is displayed on the main notice board and college website's examination portal. Please check official circulars from your department.
Semester exams at PEC follow JNTUH academic calendar. The Controller of Examinations releases the schedule 2-3 weeks before exams. Internal (mid-term) exams are held by the college separately.
You can view the latest exam schedule on the official JNTUH website and also on the PEC notice board. Both regular and supplementary exam schedules are published on the academic portal.
For lab/practical exam schedules, check with your respective department's notice board or contact your faculty coordinator. Timetables are usually available 2 weeks prior to exams.

responses: Exam fees at PEC are collected as per JNTUH norms. The fee must be paid through the official college portal or at the accounts section before the deadline. Late payments attract a penalty.
The examination fee varies based on type (regular/supplementary) and year. Exact amounts are notified via official circulars. Condonation fees apply separately for attendance shortage.
You can pay the exam fee online via the student portal or via bank challan at the accounts section. Please ensure payment before the last date to avoid late fee penalties.
For fee payment issues or to check fee status, contact the accounts section in the administrative block. Keep all payment receipts for future reference.

responses: The PEC library is well-stocked with thousands of books, journals, and digital resources. It is equipped with both traditional and digital sections for student use.
Library timings are generally 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM on working days with extended hours during exam periods. Digital library resources are accessible within the campus network.
Students can borrow books using their library card. Late returns incur a daily fine. Submit your admission receipt and ID-size photo at the librarian's desk to get your library card.
The digital library provides access to online journals and e-books. Students can use their student login credentials to access these resources within the campus Wi-Fi network.

responses: Pallavi Engineering College boasts a 96% placement rate! Top recruiters include Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, Wipro, Infosys, TCS, Cognizant, and many other IT firms. The highest package is 13 LPA.
The average salary package at PEC is 6 LPA with the lowest around 2-3 LPA. NIRF data shows a UG median salary of 3.2-3.8 LPA (2021-24) with 117-178% students placed relative to batch size.
PEC's placement cell provides rigorous pre-placement training including aptitude, coding, and soft skills. Up to 70% of students secure internships that often convert to full-time roles.

Year-wise placement data: 2021-22 (240 placed, 3.2 LPA median), 2022-23 (263 placed, 3.8 LPA median), 2023-24 (243 placed, 3.6 LPA median). Contact TPO at tpo@pallaviengineeringcollege.ac.in for more details.

responses: Internships are highly encouraged at PEC and are often a part of the curriculum. The college assists students with NOC letters and recommendation letters for industrial training and summer internships.
PEC's Training & Placement Cell coordinates internship opportunities with industry partners. Up to 70% of students secure internships, many of which convert to full-time job offers.
You can apply for internships during the summer or winter break. Contact your Head of Department for the NOC issuance and visit the T&P office for company tie-up details.

The college also offers training in global certifications, coding, and project work through its various labs and industry collaborations. Students are encouraged to pursue online certifications via platforms like NPTEL and Coursera.

responses: Pallavi Engineering College is located at Kuntloor Village, Hayathnagar, Ranga Reddy District, Hyderabad - 501505, Telangana.
For admissions, call us at 6301148377 or 8688652343. You can also email: admissions@pallaviengineeringcollege.ac.in or info@pallaviengineeringcollege.ac.in.
The official placement contact: +91-9398891087 | Email: tpo@pallaviengineeringcollege.ac.in or directorcorporaterelations@pallaviengineeringcollege.ac.in.
General college contact: +91-9247528134 / +91-9247528135. Our admin office is open Monday to Saturday, 9 AM to 5 PM. Visit us at Kuntloor, Hayathnagar, Hyderabad.

responses: The academic calendar at Pallavi Engineering College follows JNTUH guidelines and includes semester start/end dates, examination periods, and official holidays. It is published on the college website each academic year.
PEC's academic calendar is available for download from the official website: https://www.pallaviengineeringcollege.ac.in. It covers all B.Tech and MBA semester schedules.
The JNTUH academic calendar includes public holidays, mid-term schedules, and semester exam periods. Students are advised to refer to official notifications on the college notice board.
For the latest academic calendar with semester dates and holiday lists, visit the Academic Calendar section on the PEC official website or the JNTUH university portal.

responses: B.Tech total fees at PEC range from INR 2 to 2.6 lakhs for the full 4-year program, including caution deposit, exam fees, and security fees. Hostel and transport are charged additionally.
MBA fees at PEC are approximately INR 80,000 total. Hostel fees are INR 40,000-80,000 per year for boys (on-campus) and similar for girls (off-campus), including 4 meals daily.
Fee reimbursement scholarships are available for SC/ST, BC, and minority students as per Telangana Government norms. You need to apply through the Telangana eSeva portal.
For the detailed and most up-to-date fee structure, please visit the official website at https://www.pallaviengineeringcollege.ac.in or contact the accounts section at the college.

responses: PEC has an on-campus boys' hostel with a capacity of 200, charging approximately INR 5,000/month or INR 40,000-80,000/year. The girls' hostel is off-campus with similar fee structure and 4 meals per day.
Hostel rooms include basic furniture (beds, tables, wardrobes), water coolers, and have 24/7 security. Rooms are non-AC. Wi-Fi access is available on campus.
The hostel mess provides 4 meals daily. Student reviews mention the food is average. The hostel maintains strict entry/exit rules and has wardens for round-the-clock supervision.
To apply for hostel accommodation, contact the college hostel administration office at the main campus. Bring your admission documents and passport photos for the application.

responses: Top recruiters at Pallavi Engineering College include Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, Wipro, Infosys, TCS, Cognizant, HCL, Accenture, and many more IT and core industry companies.

The placement cell organizes campus recruitment drives annually. Companies like Capgemini and Tech Mahindra have offered packages up to 13 LPA (the highest recorded). Average placements are around 6 LPA.
Both IT and core companies visit PEC campus. IT: TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini, Cognizant. Core: Companies from electrical, civil, and mechanical sectors also participate in drives.

The list of recruiting companies varies each year. The Training and Placement Cell updates the company directory. Contact the T&P office or visit the placement portal on the college website for the latest list.

responses: Pallavi Engineering College claims a 96% placement rate. NIRF data (2021-24) confirms: 2021-22 (240 placed, 3.2 LPA median), 2022-23 (263 placed, 3.8 LPA median), 2023-24 (243 placed, 3.6 LPA median).

The highest package at PEC is 13 LPA (claimed), with an average of 6 LPA and lowest around 2-3 LPA. Up to 70% of students secure internships. NIRF shows 117-178% placement rate relative to batch size.
Branch-wise, CSE and ECE branches consistently lead in placement numbers. Core branches like EEE and Civil also have industry partners visiting for recruitment drives.
NIRF rankings confirm consistent placement growth at PEC. For detailed placement statistics, contact the T&P office at +91-9398891087 or visit the official placement records page on the website.

responses: Pallavi Engineering College (PEC) is a top engineering institution in Hyderabad, established in Kuntloor, Hayathnagar, Rangareddy. It is AICTE approved, affiliated to JNTUH, NAAC 'A' graded, and recognized by TCS and JNTU(H).

PEC offers B.Tech and MBA programs with a strong focus on placements, industry readiness, and innovative learning. The college boasts a 96% placement rate and an alumni network spread across leading companies.

PEC is rated approximately 3.6/5 by students (from 49 reviews). It is known for its strong placement record, qualified faculty (many with PhDs), excellent infrastructure, and active student clubs including NSS, cultural, and sports.

PEC participates in NIRF rankings annually and is recognized among top colleges in Hyderabad. Its emphasis on quality education, research, and skill development makes it a preferred choice for engineering aspirants in Telangana.

Is PEC recognized by Telangana government?
responses: Pallavi Engineering College is approved by AICTE, New Delhi and is affiliated to Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad (JNTUH). It is also NAAC 'A' graded.
PEC is a private engineering college recognized by AICTE, TCS, and JNTU(H). The degrees awarded follow JNTUH norms and are nationally and internationally recognized.
All B.Tech and MBA degrees awarded by PEC are valid as per AICTE and JNTUH guidelines. The college also submits data annually to NIRF for ranking evaluation.
PEC is not an autonomous college; it follows JNTUH syllabus and examination patterns. Its NAAC 'A' grade certifies its academic quality and institutional standards.

responses: Pallavi Engineering College is located at Kuntloor Village, Hayathnagar, Ranga Reddy District, Hyderabad - 501505, Telangana. It is near the Hayathnagar area.

The college provides transportation facilities through buses from various parts of Hyderabad. Students from LB Nagar, Secunderabad, and other areas can avail college buses. Contact the transport office for route details.
Google Maps: Search 'Pallavi Engineering College Kuntloor' to navigate to the campus. The college is approximately 25-35 km from Hyderabad city center.
Transport fees vary by route. The college ensures safe, scheduled bus services for all students. For route-wise timings and fees, contact the transport office at the main campus.

responses: As per JNTUH norms, students at PEC must maintain a minimum of 75% attendance to be eligible for semester examinations. This applies to both theory and lab classes.
Students with attendance between 65-75% may apply for condonation by paying the condonation fee and submitting medical certificates (if applicable). Below 65% may result in detention.
PEC tracks attendance through a digital system. Students and parents are notified when attendance falls below the required threshold. Internal marks may also be affected by poor attendance.
Regular attendance is crucial for academic success. Please contact your class counselor or HoD if you face medical or other issues affecting your attendance. Proper documentation must be submitted.

To check your results, visit the JNTUH results portal and enter your hall ticket number. Marks memos are issued by the college after official results are announced.
For revaluation or recounting requests, contact the examination section at PEC within the specified deadline after results are announced. Fees apply per subject.
Consolidated marksheets and provisional certificates are issued by PEC after course completion. For urgent needs, contact the examination staff in the administrative block.

Eligible students can apply for post-matric scholarships online. Required documents include: caste certificate, income certificate, Aadhaar, bank passbook, and mark sheets. Contact the scholarship cell at the college for assistance.
The scholarship amount covers a significant portion of tuition fees. SC/ST students often get full fee reimbursement, while BC students receive partial support based on income criteria.

For scholarship application status and help, visit the scholarship/welfare office at PEC or check the Telangana Government's ePass portal. Ensure you apply before the scholarship deadline each academic year.

MBA admission at PEC requires TS ICET qualification and minimum 50% marks in graduation. Management quota seats are also available. Admission helpline: 6301148377 or 8688652343.
MBA fees at PEC are approximately INR 80,000 total for the 2-year program. This may vary — contact the accounts section for the latest fee structure.
The MBA program at PEC has a strong industry focus with qualified faculty and good placement support. Graduates have secured roles in marketing, finance, and HR across reputed companies.

What are non-tuition fees at PEC?
Books and stationery fee at PEC
Is transport fee optional at PEC?
responses: B.Tech total fees at PEC are approximately INR 2 to 2.6 lakhs for the complete 4-year program. This includes caution deposit, examination fees, and security fees. Hostel and transport are charged separately.
MBA fees are approximately INR 80,000 total. Hostel fees (boys on-campus) are INR 40,000-80,000/year including meals. Transport fees vary by route and are collected separately.
Fee reimbursement is available for SC/ST, BC, and minority students per Telangana Government norms. Apply via the TS ePass portal each year with required documents.
For the exact and most current fee breakup, contact the accounts section at PEC or visit: https://www.pallaviengineeringcollege.ac.in and navigate to the Fee Particulars section.

responses: Admissions to Pallavi Engineering College for B.Tech are primarily through TS EAMCET counseling as per TSCHE/JNTUH guidelines. MBA admissions are through TS ICET counseling.
For management quota admissions, visit the college admission office directly at Kuntloor, Hayathnagar, Hyderabad with your academic documents. Call 6301148377 or 8688652343 for help.
Required documents for admission: Hall ticket of EAMCET/ICET, 10th & 12th mark sheets, Transfer Certificate, ID proof, Caste & Income certificate (if applicable), and passport photos.
Detailed admission guidelines including round-wise closing ranks, eligibility, and document requirements are published on the official website every academic year.

responses: Students from Pallavi Engineering College's CSE, ECE, and other departments have been placed in Capgemini, Tech Mahindra, Wipro, Infosys, TCS, and more with packages ranging from 3.5 to 13 LPA.
The college's 96% placement rate is backed by individual success stories of students securing roles in top IT companies through pre-placement training and campus drives.
PEC regularly highlights successful student placements through official placement reports and department notices. Many CSE graduates have received offers from multiple companies.
For specific placement stories and detailed package breakdowns, visit the placement section on the official PEC website or contact the T&P office.

Is PEC campus near any lake or landmark?
responses: Pallavi Engineering College is located at Kuntloor Village, Hayathnagar, Ranga Reddy District, Hyderabad - 501505, Telangana. The campus is near the Hayathnagar area.
PEC is situated approximately 25-35 km from Hyderabad city center, easily accessible from LB Nagar, Dilsukhnagar, and Uppal via college buses and public transport.
The college is in a semi-urban setting providing a peaceful academic environment. It is close to the Outer Ring Road (ORR), making it well-connected to various parts of Hyderabad.
Search 'Pallavi Engineering College Kuntloor' on Google Maps for accurate navigation. The Hayathnagar area in Ranga Reddy district is the nearest landmark.

responses: Pallavi Engineering College encourages students to pursue global certifications in technologies like Python, Java, Cloud Computing, Data Science, Cybersecurity, and AI/ML through platforms like NPTEL, Coursera, and Microsoft Learn.
PEC has a recognized partnership with TCS (TCS iON) for technical training and skill certification. Students are guided to pursue relevant certifications to strengthen their resumes for placements.
The college's Computer Science and IT departments actively support students in obtaining certifications from AWS, Google Cloud, Microsoft Azure, and other industry-recognized programs.
Certification training sessions are organized periodically at the college. Students can also access NPTEL and Swayam online courses for academic credit and skill enhancement.

responses: The PEC chatbot can be enhanced in the future with features like voice interaction, multilingual support (Telugu, Hindi, English), and direct integration with the student portal.
With advanced NLP models and database integration, the system can be scaled to handle real-time queries on attendance, results, fee status, and more across all departments.
Future plans may include a mobile app version, AI-powered smart responses, and integration with JNTUH portal for live exam result and schedule updates.
The architecture is designed to be scalable. As more training data is added, the bot will become more intelligent and accurate in answering diverse student queries.
